alkylation reagent: 20 mM iodoacetamide (IAA) for 45 minutes at room temperature in darkness
alkylation concentration: 20 mM iodoacetamide (IAA) for 45 minutes at room temperature in darkness
cleavage agent: two rounds of trypsin digestion as trypsin : protein = 1 : 50 for overnight
enrichment method: by using a hydrophilic interaction chromatography (HILIC) glycopeptides enrichment strategy
instrument: analyzed by Q ExactiveTM Plus hybrid quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer
labeling: peptides dissolved in 0.1% formic acid were loaded onto a reversed-phase pre-column
